reason_for_decision: The article now clears the pass threshold with strong beginner framing, clear visible-versus-thermal distinctions, and credible deployment boundaries.
strengths: The piece explains EO surveillance in plain language without oversimplifying the visible and thermal split.
It correctly positions EO as a confirmation layer rather than pretending cameras solve wide-area search alone.
The limitations around line of sight, field of view, and weather are concrete and keep the article grounded.
summary_assessment: This is now a solid foundation article. It reads naturally, stays technically believable, and helps readers decide where EO surveillance is strong and where it still needs support from other sensors.
